---
title: "Supporting Participatory Community Media and Citizens Media Literacy in Cyprus: The VoCy"
sort_year: 2015
year: "2015"
status: "Past"
funder: "Representation of the European Committee in Cyprus"
categories: [Applied Political Communication, Past]
---

**Year:** 2015
**Status:** Past
**Funder:** Representation of the European Committee in Cyprus
**Research Cluster:** Applied Political Communication
